sourceMovie.title: House of Gucci
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: House of Gucci (2021) stuck because it commits to its drama premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Ridley Scott's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The drama and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Alto Knights
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If House of Gucci clicked for you, The Alto Knights (2025) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and crime, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after House of Gucci?
faq.answer: Try The Alto Knights, The Godfather, The Godfather Part II—each shares DNA with House of Gucci while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is House of Gucci?
faq.answer: House of Gucci (2021) is best described as Drama, Crime, History. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is House of Gucci worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
